title: Default Selection on Single/Multi Select Form Fields
excerpt: On Work Forms, for “Single Select” and “Multi Select” fields, allow the form builder to select a default option so that the user does not have to choose an option unless they want to change it. Do this by making the circ…

posts.author: hcuwebdev (Chris Lampson)
posts.cookedHtml:
On Work Forms, for “Single Select” and “Multi Select” fields, allow the form builder to select a default option so that the user does not have to choose an option unless they want to change it. Do this by making the circles clickable on the form options.
